==Biography==
He started playing video-games at an age of 10 years old. Studied Computer Programming at Kocaeli University in Turkey. He also likes watching TV and listening to music. His first champion was {{ci|Sion}} because of his brother. He played it and became better.

== Trivia ==
* Known for his ''Turkish Lee Sin'' meme.<ref>[https://www.reddit.com/r/LeagueOfMemes/comments/mc7lto/turkish_lee_sin/ Reddit Post]''reddit.com''</ref>
